title: Light SMP
description: The lightweight SMP modpack to play with friends on potato-medium PC
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y9h7m3po/images/9b4d0f631f7ce3adbda3999f60745609108f8f90.png 'Biome boundary')

> **This is the simple lightweight SMP modpack to play with friends.
> Why you should play on it? Because it:**
> 1. Lightweight
> 2. Simple installing
> 3. Have all Forge optimization mods
> 4. Have server version
> 5. Fun!

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

1. Will this build pull on a weak PC? Yes, a video card starting from GTX 800 Series(or an analog from AMD), and almost any processor running minecraft is enough.

2. Will the build be updated? Yes, I will try to do it every month.

3. Where can I tell you about my mistakes? [Here](https://discord.com/invite/4US49nhybq 'Here').

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Thanks to [aureljz](https://modrinth.com/user/aureljz)(JW8OlCkl) for [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)!


</details>
